'''sabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zonately|zonately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zonately|zonately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sabate|sabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sabatesher|sabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabatesherĂ«m|sabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sabatero|sabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sabateshĂ«|sabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabateshĂ«m|sabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisabatero|gokisabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisabateshĂ«|gokisabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabateshĂ«m|gokisabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosabankerom|gosabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosabankeshĂ«|gosabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosabankeshĂ«m|gosabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosabankeya|gosabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sabaterom|sabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabatemu|sabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sabateya|sabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisabaterom|gokisabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabatemu|gokisabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisabateya|gokisabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sababate|sababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sababatesher|sababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sababatesherĂ«m|sababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sababatero|sababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sababateshĂ«|sababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sababateshĂ«m|sababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisababatero|gokisababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisababateshĂ«|gokisababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisababateshĂ«m|gokisababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosababankerom|gosababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosababankeshĂ«|gosababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosababankeshĂ«m|gosababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosababankeya|gosababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sababaterom|sababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sababatemu|sababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sababateya|sababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisababaterom|gokisababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisababatemu|gokisababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisababateya|gokisababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠte|sĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠtesher|sĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠtero|sĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠtero|gokisĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠterom|sĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠtemu|sĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠteya|sĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠterom|gokisĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠbĂŠteya|gokisĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safbafte|safbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safbaftesher|safbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safbaftesherĂ«m|safbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safbaftero|safbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safbafteshĂ«|safbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safbafteshĂ«m|safbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafbaftero|gokisafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafbafteshĂ«|gokisafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafbafteshĂ«m|gokisafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafbafnkerom|gosafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafbafnkeshĂ«|gosafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafbafnkeshĂ«m|gosafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafbafnkeya|gosafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safbafterom|safbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safbaftemu|safbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safbafteya|safbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafbafterom|gokisafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafbaftemu|gokisafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafbafteya|gokisafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
